features: POWERFUL SCRUBBING ACTION: These power cloths are designed with green scrub dots to help break down tough and stubborn stains. Whether dealing with dried food on worktops or grease splatters on the hob, these cloths make cleaning effortless. The non-scratch surface ensures delicate areas remain damage-free, making them safe for use on all surfaces.

SUPER SIZE FOR MAXIMUM COVERAGE: Each cloth measures an impressive 36cm x 35cm, making it larger than standard dish cloths for washing up. The generous size means fewer rinses and more efficient cleaning, perfect for tackling large areas like kitchen counters and bathroom tiles. A must-have for speeding up daily cleaning tasks.

EXTRA THICK & HIGHLY ABSORBENT: With a super absorbent design, these cleaning cloths soak up spills with ease. Great for mopping up water on kitchen surfaces or wiping down condensation from bathroom mirrors. The thick material ensures they hold more liquid, reducing the need for multiple wipes.

WASHABLE & REUSABLE: Forget single-use cloths – these reusable cleaning cloths are machine washable at 40°C. Simply wash, air dry, and use again to reduce waste and save money. The durable material withstands multiple washes while maintaining its effectiveness, ensuring a reliable clean every time.

NON SCRATCH FOR GENTLE CLEANING: While tough on dirt, these power cloths are gentle on delicate surfaces. Use them to clean stainless steel appliances, glass surfaces, and ceramic hobs without worrying about scratches. Ideal for keeping kitchens and bathrooms looking spotless without damage.

PERFECT FOR KITCHEN CLEANING: These kitchen cleaner cloths make wiping down surfaces, scrubbing grease, and cleaning sinks effortless. Use them to freshen up countertops, remove sticky spills, and polish taps for a sparkling finish. Their durable design makes them an essential tool for daily cleaning routines.

TACKLE BATHROOM CLEANING WITH EASE: Keep bathroom surfaces fresh and hygienic with these versatile cleaning cloths. Ideal for scrubbing limescale from sinks, removing soap residue from shower screens, and wiping down tiles for a streak-free shine. Their absorbent design ensures a thorough clean with minimal effort.

MULTI-PURPOSE FOR YOUR HOME: These cleaning cloths are perfect for dusting, wiping, and scrubbing in every room. Use them to clean skirting boards, remove marks from walls, or freshen up furniture. A versatile addition to any cleaning kit, ready to tackle dirt wherever it appears.

IDEAL FOR WASHING UP DISHES: Make washing up easier with these effective dish cloths for washing up. Their scrub dots help lift food residue from plates, pans, and cutlery, leaving them sparkling clean. A great alternative to disposable sponges, providing an easy long-lasting cleaning solution.

FUN BRIGHT PRACTICAL DESIGN: The vibrant yellow colour with green scrub dots makes these cloths easy to spot in a busy kitchen. Their eye-catching design ensures they stand out among other cleaning products, helping to keep cleaning routines organised. Functional, stylish, and built to last – these cloths are an essential for any home.
description: Product Description Elbow Grease Super Size Power Cloths With Scrub Dots – Tough on Stains, Gentle on Surfaces These Elbow Grease Super Size Power Cloths with Scrub Dots make cleaning easier and more effective. Designed to tackle stubborn stains, these extra-thick cleaning cloths are super absorbent, non-scratch, and reusable. Whether scrubbing grease in the kitchen or removing soap scum in the bathroom, these cloths deliver powerful results. The yellow cloths with green scrub dots work hard on dirt while being gentle on surfaces. Ideal for washing up, wiping down, or polishing, they help keep every corner of the home spotless. Machine washable at 40 degrees and long-lasting, these cleaning cloths are an essential addition to any cleaning routine. Ingredients cotton cloth Manufacturer Contact Information Elbow Grease Power Cloths 7 pack See more
